testcase.name: findByParentIsNullAndIsActiveTrueOrderBySortOrderAsc_shouldReturnOnlyActiveRootsSorted

null, updated_at timestamp(6), sku varchar(50) not null unique, edition varchar(100), cover_image_url varchar(500), thumbnail_url varchar(500), cover_type enum ('hard','soft'), primary key (id) )
